默认分类: 关于在外观上相似的个人披风，请见“cheapsh0t的披风”；关于授予中文翻译者的披风，请见“Crowdin中文翻译者披风”。
本条目所述内容仅适用于Java版。
Translator: Crowdin翻译者披风（Translator Cape）是授予Crowdin翻译者的披风。
描述: 在Minecraft位于Crowdin的翻译计划中，这个披风在一次公平的骰子决定之后被授予了29位翻译员，以后时不时地此披风会被授予更多的翻译者，但后来Jeb在看到一些翻译者使用机翻和给合适翻译投反对票等恶意行为后表示取消了这项计划。
截至2016年5月7日，这项计划似乎已恢复，原因目前还不得而知。
历史: Crowdin翻译者披风披风在一次公平的骰子决定之后被授予了29位翻译员。
Crowdin翻译者披风被授予了一些Crowdin审核员。
参考: 29 translators have now received a Minecraft cape (based on a secret selection formula + they have added their MC name to crowdin)，来自@jeb_。X（曾名Twitter）。
@adiacente Decided by a fair dice roll!，来自@jeb_。X（曾名Twitter）。

Your profile was included in my selection, but you must've added your Minecraft name after I ran the parsing program. I will obviously update the translator list as time goes on, but it's surrounded with a lot of manual labor, so I'll probably not do it very often. However, adding a note to my calendar to fix yours specifically, on Friday.，来自u/jeb_。Reddit。

Seriously, this is why I stopped handing out translator capes =( The idea was to give something cool back to the ones who helped out, but the result was a bunch of "me too:s" that just auto-translated stuff and down-voted real translations.，来自u/jeb_。Reddit。
